productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Denim Co. Men Black Shirt
description: Style NoteThis stylish shirt from the US Polo Collection is crafted from soft cotton fabric and has a contemporary cut that offers a flattering silhouette, making for an easy addition to your wardrobe. Team it with crisp chinos and leather shoes or jeans and sneakers paired with classy accessories for that perfect look.Product DetailsBlack shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar with a buttoned front placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and mid button tabs, pockets on the front with buttoned flaps, embroidered branding above the left pocket, button tabs on the shoulders and a curved hem  Material and Care100% cottonMachine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergentTumble dry lowWarm iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitSlim fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
